narrative:
DRIVER
USD is fading on H4 CSM (44 vs D1 100), a 56-point divergence that is the single most critical signal in this session, while CHF (H4 100 vs D1 33) and AUD (H4 70 vs D1 31) are both accelerating hard against the dominant risk-off D1 regime, driven by copper up 1.95% and S&P 500 extending gains. USDCHF sells directly express CHF acceleration, AUDUSD and AUDJPY express AUD strength with AUDUSD-AUDJPY correlation at 0.89 confirming the cluster, and NZDUSD amplifies via 0.88 correlation to AUDUSD with NZD H4 CSM also printing 62. CADJPY is the live counter-trade: H4 Strong Sell at -6 with CAD ranked dead last on H4 CSM at 0, directly conflicting the D1 neutral read.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: None
Fading: None

WATCH
Copper extends above 6.40 triggering further AUDUSD H4 buying toward next resistance as commodity bid confirms AUD acceleration
USDCAD D1 Strong Buy H4 Buy alignment risks breakout if CAD weakness deepens, watch for confirmation above current range
NZDJPY H4 Strong Buy at +4 activates on any JPY softening, copper and S&P holding positive is the trigger condition

themes.theme: Technology Sector Rotation and AI Stock Volatility
Mixed Equity Market Signals with Earnings Volatility

key_observation: Headlines show risk-on mood from Iran peace hopes supporting equities, but dominated by idiosyncratic equity stories rather than macro FX drivers. No significant central bank, economic data, or currency-specific news. Agricultural commodity weakness suggests modest USD strength. Technology sector internally conflicted with Google-Nvidia dynamics creating sector rotation rather than directional conviction.
watch: Equity market follow-through on geopolitical optimism. Tech sector earnings quality and AI narrative sustainability. Agricultural commodity trends for commodity currency implications. Absence of Asian economic calendar may reduce FX volatility overnight.
